caption: A man is seated at a table in a studio, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters, and a gold watch on his left wrist. He sits before a professional broadcast microphone mounted on a boom arm, looking toward someone off-camera to his left. In the background, a white banner features several gold stars and the text "UNION HUSTLE." Above him, a blue sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". A black object and a dark container are on the table to his right. On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK ONE" in red and white. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a nearly identical position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his hands, while the overall setting and equipment stay stationary.
